class DataStore:
    def __init__(self):
        self._cache = {}

    @property
    def items(self):
        return self._cache

    def get(self, key):
        return self._cache.get(key)


class SessionManager:
    def __init__(self):
        self._sessions = {}

    @property
    def active_sessions(self):
        return self._sessions

    def add(self, session_id, data):
        self._sessions[session_id] = data


class CacheService:
    def __init__(self):
        self._store = {}

    @property
    def store(self):
        return self._store
